creator: danfe@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Port added with modifications, including, but not limited to: 
- Better pkg-message handling and formatting 
- Missing mkisofs(8) dependency added 
- Better IGNORE message text 
- Correct handling of /boot/opt directory in PLIST 
- Fixes to make sure both port and package installation works 
- Miscellaneous cleanups 

Thanks!
